message:
🐛 Save partial progress data to cache when progressive fetcher throws (#2794)

Root cause of 23 hooks not caching: progressive fetchers push data
via onProgress callbacks (updating state.data in memory), then throw
when the fallback path (fetchFromAllClusters) has no clusters/token.
The catch block recorded the failure but never saved the data that
was already on screen.

Fix: in the catch block, if state.data has been updated by progress
callbacks (hasData is true), save it to storage. This means:
- Data shown on screen survives page refresh
- Failure counter doesn't increment when we have usable data
- isFailed stays false when partial data was received

Affects 23 hooks that use progressiveFetcher → fetchViaSSE →
fetchFromAllClusters fallback chain: nodes, operators, helm,
namespaces, PVCs, jobs, configmaps, secrets, etc.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
